film.title: Shootout at Lokhandwala
film.overview: An account of the gangster Maya Dolas and his gang which terrorized Mumbai City, and the ensuing standoff between Mumbai Police and the gang on 16 November 1991.

dialogues.dialogue: I am Mita Μatu, reporting for TVN. Mumbai, Lokhandwala. Because of one officer, the entire....police department is distressed. This is shameful, sir! We can't forgive Khan. I mean without justification.. without authorisation....surrounding a residential building....firing without caring for the citizen's life....all this is written in which police manual, sir?
dialogues.cause_raw: reckless behavior and endangering citizens' lives

dialogues.dialogue: Ηindi is epitome of our culture. It is memento of our ancestors. But shame on ruining our mother tongue. That is leading to disappearance of our culture. Yes.
dialogues.cause_raw: not respecting and preserving mother tongue

dialogues.dialogue: What he said, exactly that happened. Αs long as I am there, no policeman will be shot. I and the citizens of Mumbai are proud that....we have officers like ACP S.S. Khan for our protection. I am Mita Μatu, from Αntop Ηill, Mumbai. I think she is your big fan. She is beautiful too.

What he said, exactly that happened. As long as I am there, no policeman will be shot. I and the citizens of Mumbai are proud that....we have officers like ACP S S. Khan for our protection. I am Mita Matu, from Antop Hill, Mumbai. I think she is your big fan. She is beautiful too.
